_comment: 潔淨能源科技大國榜：人工整理，附來源。

title.zh: 中國 — 潔淨能源設備世界工廠

body.zh: 全球超過 80% 的太陽能板（從多晶矽到模組的每個環節）、約 60% 的風力機、約 80% 的電池芯都在中國製造；主要潔淨科技每個環節的產能佔比都超過 70%，並吸走 2024 年全球 76% 的潔淨科技建廠投資。
body.en: China makes over 80% of the world's solar panels (every step from polysilicon to modules), ~60% of wind turbines and ~80% of battery cells; it holds >70% of capacity in every major clean-tech segment and attracted 76% of global clean-tech factory investment in 2024.

title.zh: 台灣 — 節能晶片的心臟
title.en: Taiwan — the heart of energy-efficient chips

body.zh: 全球 90% 以上的最先進製程晶片（3–5 奈米）由台積電生產。每一代先進製程都大幅降低單位運算耗電，是全球資料中心、手機與 AI 提升能源效率的關鍵。
body.en: Over 90% of the world's most advanced chips (3–5 nm) are made by TSMC. Each new process node cuts energy per computation sharply — the key to efficiency gains in data centers, phones and AI worldwide.

body.zh: Vestas 是中國以外最大的風機製造商（2024 年新增 10.2GW、居全球第五，拿下中國以外市場近三分之一）；Ørsted 則開創了現代離岸風電產業。丹麥自身電網的風電佔比也是世界最高之一。
body.en: Vestas is the largest wind-turbine maker outside China (10.2 GW added in 2024, 5th globally, nearly a third of the ex-China market), and Ørsted pioneered the modern offshore wind industry. Denmark's own grid runs on one of the world's highest wind shares.

body.zh: 2024 年全球前四大風機製造商（金風 19.3GW、遠景 14.5GW、運達 12.5GW、明陽 12.2GW）首度全部來自中國——十年前這份榜單還由歐美主導。
body.en: In 2024, for the first time, the world's top four turbine makers (Goldwind 19.3 GW, Envision 14.5 GW, Windey 12.5 GW, Mingyang 12.2 GW) were all Chinese — a list dominated by Western firms just a decade ago.
